title: Ilex gracilior
taxonomy: Ilex gracilior is classified as a species of holly in the family Aquifoliaceae. It belongs to the genus Ilex and is native to China. The species is further divided into various subspecies and cultivars, each with distinct characteristics. Ilex gracilior is closely related to other species of holly, such as Ilex pedunculosa and Ilex latifolia. The plant's classification is used to identify its unique features and genetic makeup.
